description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a spacious, open layout and a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The property features a large backyard with a patio area, outdoor seating, and a circular pool or hot tub. The house itself is two stories tall, with large windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light and views of the landscaped garden. The front of the house includes a driveway with a parked car, a small front yard with trees, and a main entrance that is slightly recessed for privacy. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of white plaster, wood paneling, and glass, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a patio and circular pool. The exterior combines white plaster, wood, and glass for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the house, backyard with patio, outdoor seating, and circular pool, as well as the landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and two large trees in the front yard.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the backyard, flat roof sections, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and garden.
description_view_3: Backyard-facing view emphasizing the patio, outdoor seating, circular pool, and the rear facade with large windows and sliding doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, small overhang, and adjacent driveway; minimal decorative elements.
